title: While and Until 🔁
description: Learn to repeat code while a condition is true, or until it becomes true.

slides.title: Doing Things Repeatedly 🔁
slides.content:
Imagine you need to print 'Hello' to the screen 1,000 times.

You wouldn't want to type `puts "Hello"` a thousand times!

Instead, programmers use **Loops** to repeat actions seamlessly.

slides.title: The While Loop
slides.content:
A `while` loop checks a condition, and if it is `true`, runs the block of code.

Then, it loops back to the top and checks the condition again. It keeps looping until the condition becomes `false`.

```ruby
i = 0
while i < 5
  puts i
  i = i + 1
end
```

slides.title: While in Action
slides.content: Watch the loop count down from 5 to 1.
slides.codeSnippet:
countdown = 5

while countdown > 0
  puts countdown
  countdown = countdown - 1
end

puts "Blastoff!"

quizData.question: What is vital to include inside a `while` loop to ensure it doesn't run forever?

options.text: Code that changes the variable being checked, so the condition eventually evaluates to false.

quizData.explanation: If the condition stays true forever, the loop becomes an infinite loop and crashes your program.

slides.title: The Until Loop 🚫
slides.content:
Just like how `if/unless` are opposites, `while` has an opposite loop: **`until`**.

A `while` loop runs *as long as* the condition is true. 
An `until` loop runs *as long as* the condition is false.

It stops looping only when the condition FINALLY becomes true.

slides.title: Until in Action
slides.content: This reads like English: "Keep adding gas UNTIL the tank is full."
slides.codeSnippet:
gas = 0
tank_full = false

until tank_full
  puts "Pumping gas..."
  gas = gas + 1
  if gas == 3
    tank_full = true
  end
end

puts "Tank is full!"

quizData.question: When does an `until` loop officially stop running?

options.text: When its condition evaluates to true.
When its condition evaluates to false.

quizData.explanation: An `until` loop continues executing up until the exact moment its condition finally flips to `true`.
